_note: No producer-computed values. Every field is either a structural shape, a named enum constant, or a boundary condition. The objective enum values and required fields are specified by feature-plans/ai-advisor.md AC-3.1..AC-3.4 + Gate-1 Resolution #2.

reduce_drawdown.description: Reduce maximum drawdown relative to the incumbent logic parameters
reduce_drawdown._note: measured_value is from the backtest stats (max-drawdown fraction, negative), never hardcoded

lift_risk_adjusted.description: Lift risk-adjusted return (Sharpe/Sortino) relative to incumbent params
lift_risk_adjusted._note: measured_value is the current Sharpe ratio from backtest stats, never hardcoded

reduce_turnover._note: measured_value is the signal-change rate from backtest stats, never hardcoded

operator_initiated_mode._note: Operator specifies the exact parameter change to try. old_value must match the current value at the node_path or the variant is rejected as structurally invalid.

advisor_suggested_mode.candidate_generation_must: select tweaks that address the stated objective
candidate_generation_must_not: generate candidates by brute-forcing all numeric parameters without objective filtering
generate candidates based on vibes (random selection or popularity-based)
bypass the objective to surface pre-decided candidates
advisor_suggested_mode._note: Per Gate-1 Resolution #2: every logic change must be OBJECTIVE-DIRECTED. A naive generator that ignores the objective MUST produce a test FAIL. The objective type determines WHICH parameters to target and in WHICH direction.

multiple_testing_guardrail.mandate: ALL N backtested candidates submitted as ONE batch to evaluate_candidate_batch
multiple_testing_guardrail.forbidden: gating candidates individually (per-candidate calls to evaluate_candidate_batch)
multiple_testing_guardrail.test_vector: submit N=3 candidates → verify gate_batch.n_candidates == 3 (not 1, not None)
multiple_testing_guardrail._note: Raising N raises the BHY adjusted threshold. Individual gating silently disables the FDR denominator and is a test FAIL.

gating_contract.gate_failed_disposition: NOT surfaced as recommendation; may be shown as rejected with reason
gating_contract.zero_survivors_message_required: no logic change cleared the gate this run
gating_contract._note: AC-3.1 / AC-3.3 / AC-3.4. Every surfaced survivor must carry SURVIVOR_OVERFITTING_CAVEAT from backtest_gate_engine.

invalid_tweak_contract.structurally_invalid_tweak: must produce per-candidate 'could not backtest this variant' error
invalid_tweak_contract._note: AC-X5. A tweak whose old_value does not match the current value in the tree — or whose node_path cannot be navigated — is structurally invalid and must not cause an unhandled exception or abort other candidates.

apply_guidance_contract._note: AC-X1 / AC-3.4. The advisor never auto-applies changes. Guidance is always 'To apply: open {symphony} in Composer and manually adjust ...' — always an instruction for the operator, never an automated action.

persistence_contract._note: AC-X3. Every ADOPT_CANDIDATE survivor is persisted via database.insert_advisor_observation with is_advisory_only=1 and observation_type='logic_change_proposal'.

no_api_key_contract.message_must_contain: advisor unavailable: API key not configured
no_api_key_contract._note: AC-X4. An absent Composer API key must produce a clear error, zero observations written, and no exception propagating to the caller.

sample_score_tree_for_tests._note: Minimal score tree with one numeric parameter; suitable for testing apply_logic_tweak and extract_numeric_params
sample_score_tree_for_tests.name: Test Symphony

sample_tweak_reduce_drawdown._note: Example reduce_drawdown tweak for the sample_score_tree above

sample_tweak_invalid._note: Example tweak whose old_value does not match — must produce structurally invalid error
sample_tweak_invalid.node_description: window=999 (this value does not exist in the tree)
